projects.name: CloakCode
projects.summary: Observe and steer a live GitHub Copilot session from your phone without uploading your workspace.

projects.name: BMW Connected for Homey
projects.summary: A Homey app that monitors BMW and Mini vehicles through the official BMW CarData API, with real-time MQTT streaming.

projects.name: SemanticPluginForge
projects.summary: A dynamic metadata provider for Semantic Kernel plugins, allowing plugin descriptions to be updated at runtime.

projects.name: bmw-connected-drive
projects.summary: An unofficial TypeScript client for the BMW ConnectedDrive services, reverse-engineered from the web app.
